title: WeatherBox Notification
description: Unified notification schema used across MQTT, Serial UART, and WebSocket layers

id.description: Unique notification ID (used for deduplication). Format: <source>-<platform-message-id>

sender.description: Display name of the person or system that sent the message

preview.description: Truncated message body shown on TFT and feed UI

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the message was originally sent

metadata.description: Optional platform-specific fields. Not displayed on TFT; available to rules engine and feed UI.
